display_text: Horizon, Cost: 0: A neutral item that applies a knockback effect to a targeted unit, pushing them away for 250 distance over 1 second. The effect pierces spell immunity, making it effective even against magic-immune targets. This provides repositioning utility to create distance from enemies or set up follow-up abilities. Stats: CD: 10s, Knockback Distance: 250, Knockback Duration: 1s.
